articles.title: Amazon Redshift introduces AWS Graviton-based RG instances with an integrated data lake query engine
articles.summary: Amazon Redshift RG instances, powered by AWS Graviton, run data warehouse and data lake workloads up to 2.4x as fast as RA3 instances at 30% lower price per vCPU. Its integrated data lake query engine supports open table formats such as Apache Iceberg.
